description: Canonical verifier authority and immutable closure repair
required_changes: Remove FACTORIZE_COMMAND override variable from make/long-tests.mk
Hardcode canonical command: go run ./cmd/leamas factory factorize
Update tests to not rely on FACTORIZE_COMMAND
Add test verifying Makefile contains no FACTORIZE_COMMAND
Create proper F → S → C closure sequence with post-closure attestation
acceptance_criteria: Editor-context refusal remains effective for public, canonical and parallel paths
No Make variable can substitute the canonical factorize verifier
Real factorize passes against exact subject S
CORRECTION05 plan contains no self-referential Git identities
Closure manifest records F, F_TREE, S, S_TREE
Post-closure attestation records C, C_TREE, tag object, peeled target
Publication is an ordinary fast-forward with no history rewriting
_note: Git OIDs (freeze_commit, freeze_tree, subject_commit, etc.) are NOT permitted in this plan. They must be recorded in closure manifest and post-closure attestation.
